title: Workshop: Build an Emergency Volunteer Briefing Schedule
summary: Workshop: Build an Emergency Volunteer Briefing Schedule retrieves prior skills in an original multi-track heat-response volunteer briefing schedule scenario and requires implementation, behavior, failure-state, and transfer evidence.
objectives: Apply accessibility tree, keyboard focus, accessible names descriptions in unfamiliar constraints.
Produce or audit a real multi-track heat-response volunteer briefing schedule artifact without happy-path-only reasoning.
Preserve earlier requirements while testing keyboard, narrow-width, invalid, and assistive-semantic states.
